articles.headline: World Cup Daily: Yamal shines, Belgium blanks, Egypt top Group G
articles.description: Another day's worth of FIFA World Cup action is in the books with Spain romping past Saudi Arabia, Belgium being held by Iran, and Mohamed Salah's Egypt taking all three points from their clash with New Zealand.

articles.headline: Argentina's Scaloni says water breaks fragment game
articles.description: Argentina national team manager Lionel Scaloni said the newly implemented hydration breaks at the FIFA World Cup make for a fragmented match, giving the weaker side an advantage for the second part of the half.

images.caption: Lionel Scaloni speaks to the media ahead of Argentina's game against Austria at the World Cup.
images.alt: Lionel Scaloni speaks to the media ahead of Argentina's game against Austria at the World Cup.
